film.title: Santa Banta Pvt Ltd
film.overview: Two friends and their sweet and endearing misadventures and one of these misadventures sees them land in the middle of a kidnapping investigation.

dialogues.dialogue: Very sorry for the inconvenience. Should I say that? Shame on us! - I understand. But, believe me, we are doing our best. I request you, Mr. Sultan......tell Ms. Kareena to act perfectly‘ normal at the party.

Here is my card. If you find the real Santa and Banta, call and tell me. What is it? - Shame on you! Rather than call you my boss......I would rather knead dough in a bakery or sell ice cream on carts! You were hounding Santa and Banta. But, you let go when you got them and gave your visiting card!
Let's go. Are you alright, sir? Santa and Banta! Please. You've done well. You've made the country proud. Mention not. - Okay! Please, leave. - Banta, let's go.
Because, this time, you have a point. You're getting late. Please. I am proud of you, Mr. Santa and Mr. Banta. You have made the country proud. Ms. QT, I have a gift for you.
You're getting late. Please. I am proud of you, Mr. Santa and Mr. Banta. You have made the country proud. Ms. QT, I have a gift for you. This is the most prized possession of my life.
Congratulations! - Thanks you. Congratulations to you, too! The country is proud of you. Although you aren't real agents you did very well. So, I want you to be our agents, officially.
